message:
test(types): B10 wave 8 invariant tests for id and resource

types/id: 39 new tests (42 total) covering RegionId Debug/Display/Eq/Hash/
Ord/Copy/testing_default/ephemeral_unique/serde_roundtrip, TaskId same suite,
ObligationId same suite, Time Display all 4 branches (seconds/ms/us/ns),
Time Debug/Default/MAX/saturation_add_overflow/saturation_sub_underflow/
duration_since/add_Duration/from_millis_saturation/from_secs_saturation/
serde_roundtrip/hash_consistency.

types/resource: 22 new tests (35 total) covering PoolConfig Default/Debug,
PoolStats Default/Debug, SymbolBuffer operations/zero_size/Debug,
PoolExhausted Display+Error, ResourceExhausted Display all 5 variants,
ResourceKind Debug all variants, ResourceLimits Default is_zero/non_zero,
ResourceUsage Default, ResourceRequest Default+accessor, ResourceTracker
Debug/pressure_zero/can_acquire, ResourceGuard Debug, pool reset_stats/
peak_usage_tracking/try_acquire_decoding/config_max_clamp.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
